title: Cassandra Nova
content:
{{AltUniverse|the "[[Cassandra Nova Birthed Universe]]"|3=Characters|4=1}} {{Character |image = Cassandra Nova.png |real name = Cassandra Nova{{Ref|DW}} {{Conjecture|Xavier}} |alias = {{Alias |derivatives = Cassandy{{Ref|DW}} |undercover = [[Vanessa Carlysle]]{{Ref|DW}}}} |species = [[Mutant]] |gender = Female |DOD = [[2020s/Earth-10005#2024|2024]]{{Ref|DW}} |affiliation = {{Affiliation|CNH}} |movie = ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' |actor = [[Emma Corrin]]
[[Morena Baccarin]] (illusion) |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|The [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] is a paradise. I can wield my power here without shame. Unfortunately, I didn't have [[Professor X/Cassandra Nova Birthed|Charles Xavier]] to teach me temperance.|Cassandra Nova to [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} '''Cassandra Nova {{Conjecture|Xavier}}''' was an Omega-level [[mutant]] and the twin sister of [[Professor X/Cassandra Nova Birthed|Charles Xavier]]. Upon her banishment to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] by the [[Time Variance Authority]], Nova took a liking to it and gained permission to run her operations there as she pleased, building an armed [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen|community of survivors]]. Nova came into conflict with freshly pruned [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]], who were trying to get home, while Nova had no intention of letting them out. When the [[Resistance]] successfully disrupted her operations, Nova was betrayed and almost killed by [[Pyro]], but Deadpool and Wolverine saved her life, so she got them out of the Void. Realizing that the TVA and [[Paradox]] broke their agreement, Nova followed them out of the Void, intending to use the [[Time Ripper]] to eradicate all the realities in the [[Multiverse]] besides the Void. Her plan failed, and Nova was atomized by the energy of the Time Ripper when Deadpool and Wolverine overloaded it. ==Biography== {{MD|Cassandra Nova Xavier (Earth-TRN872)}} ===Early Life=== ====Banished to the Void==== {{Quote|[[Time Variance Authority|They]] sent me [[Void (End of Time)|here]] before I could walk. And you know, that's the best thing that ever happened to me. I love it here.|Cassandra Nova to [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} Cassandra Nova was the twin sister of [[Professor X/Cassandra Nova Birthed|Charles Xavier]], trying to strangle him with her umbilical cord while they both were still in the womb.{{Ref|DW}} Both twins were born,[https://www.amazon.com/Deadpool-Wolverine-Shawn-Levy/dp/B0D626MXVK/ref=sr_1_1?crid=2QQSBFHTX9I01&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.aVg1m7ojoG50tZXrNwHEWpuR8ODT3MhbgovyiO5EqVo5mhVupsQLJ3Y-SOGiLyQwnz57SDrSw-BNZNU8ZjHd-cvF-rL7ivSpdDgqW1nWRpzl_IhIUS3qIlwz76Fr6nJqXWraDqXGn1D1btcbxEIm1ONKNA3WSZshIwwmLbayk08ue-6QmXmSwFOFKC0XgCUWx7zIWV3zAHa76pPfXov2KJbNAJZ3NeLFk5nuAMo1iL8.MYjhsSA3vqzJIeLBSAIh9weWI3AicR2Fa88nNJfAaag&dib_tag=se&keywords=deadpool+and+wolverine&qid=1727798936&s=instant-video&sprefix=deadp%2Cinstant-video%2C93&sr=1-1 Amazon Prime Video Description] but before Nova learned how to walk,{{Ref|DW}} Xavier tried to psychically kill Nova as he became one of the most powerful mutants of all time. This led to her getting discovered by the [[Time Variance Authority]][https://www.tiktok.com/@marvel/video/7397167312396176670?_r=1&_t=8oXgfjLALsY Marvel Entertainment on TikTok - July 29, 2024] and sent to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] by them. Unlike most of the Void inhabitants, Nova took a liking to her new place of living, as she could use her extraordinary powers without any restraint or shame. She rapidly became one of the most formidable entities in the Void, with the only comparable power being the more beastly [[Alioth]], while building a [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen|community]] of other Void survivors based in [[Giant-Man/Giant-Man Pruned|Giant-Man]]'s [[Cassandra Nova's Lair|corpse]].{{Ref|DW}} She began finding inhabitants of the Void to psychically torture using her mutant abilities. Nova's reign over the Void was not without pushback, as some survivors refused to be her slaves and formed the [[Resistance]] to overthrow her. However, each and every attempt to take Nova down only resulted in loss and casualties, with Nova personally killing [[Magneto/Earth-10005|Magneto]] and destroying his [[Magneto's Helmet|helmet]] that allowed the wearer to withstand her psychic powers. Nova's cruelty wasn't just limited to members of the Resistance as she often killed stray [[Glossary#Variants|Variants]] who were unwilling to bend to her will. This included multiple versions of her twin, [[Hub:Charles Xavier|Charles Xavier]], who she killed before taking one of their [[Charles Xavier's Wheelchair|wheelchair]] for herself. She also killed a [[Doctor Strange/Infinity Stone Sling Ring|Doctor Strange]] who was present in the Void before she skinned him and wore his skin for several days. She also obtained this Strange's [[Cloak of Levitation|cloak]] and [[Time Stone|Time]] and [[Reality Stone]]-infused [[Sling Ring]] that gave her the ability to leave the Void if she wished. She was approached by [[Paradox]] from the TVA, who offered to let her deal with the variants in the Void however she wanted so that TVA could keep Nova at bay.{{Ref|DW}} ===[[Preservation of Earth-10005|Conflict with Deadpool and Wolverine]]=== ====New Arrivals==== [[File:Cassandra Nova in the Void.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nova steps out to greet her new prisoners]] {{Quote|But I'm not like the rest of you. Except maybe the Wolverine. Now, we could be truly terrifying together."
"You're that scary, huh?|Cassandra Nova and [[Wolverine]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} [[Pyro]] and [[Toad]] returned from their hunt, and had successfully captured [[Human Torch/Void-Analyzing Fantastic Four|Human Torch]], as well as [[Deadpool]], [[Wolverine]] and a [[Minutemen|Minuteman]], so Nova came out to speak with them. After getting up from [[Charles Xavier's Wheelchair]], Nova remarked about this was the first [[Hub:Logan|Wolverine]] she had encountered in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], knowing him as one of [[Professor X/Cassandra Nova Birthed|Professor X]]'s [[X-Men/Mutant Genocide|X-Men]]. [[Deadpool]] asked how she knew Professor X, so she explained her past to them as his twin sister. [[File:Deadpool & Wolverine Purpose (17).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nova introduced to [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]]] Nova was amused by Deadpool and Wolverine, so she untied them and then turned her attention to Human Torch, who she had been trying to capture for years. Deadpool interrupted, revealing the foul things Human Torch had said about Nova, although Human Torch tried to deny it as Deadpool persisted. Nova listened to the insults about her, and decided to kill Human Torch, brutally ripping his skin off his body with telekinesis. Nova witnessed [[Alioth]] approaching the [[Cassandra Nova's Lair|compound]] as Deadpool tried to explain that he was trying to save his world. [[File:Cassandra Nova.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nova explains how she ended up in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]]] Nova was doubtful of Deadpool's ability to save his own world, which she sensed was something he was sensitive about. Wolverine inquired about the wheelchair, so Nova told him how she would encounter [[Hub:Charles Xavier|Variants]] of her brother occasionally. Nova then commented on how she was similar to Wolverine in regard to how dangerous they were, and she elaborated on how she ended up in the Void, expressing how much she loved her life. Wolverine went to attack Nova, but she gleefully stopped him in place and buried him in the ground with her powers before pushing him away from her. [[File:Cassandra Nova Crew.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nova refuses to help [[Deadpool]] return home]] Deadpool pleaded that he only wanted to get back home, which Nova could organize but she did not want to. Nova used her powers to force her hand through Deadpool's head to access his memories. Discovering a memory of Deadpool and [[Vanessa Carlysle]] breaking up, Nova manipulated Carlysle's words to make her say that he would never matter, knowing that was Deadpool's biggest insecurity. Wolverine snuck up behind Nova and stabbed her and Deadpool threw his [[Baby Knife|knife]] at her, but it had no effect and she knocked him away along with the knife. As Alioth neared, Nova retreated to let Deadpool and Wolverine die, but they managed to [[Escape from Cassandra Nova's Lair|escape]].{{Ref|DW}} ====[[Assault on Cassandra Nova's Lair|Dethroned]]==== [[File:Cassandra Nova Looks Out.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nova witnessing the [[Resistance]]'s assault]] {{Quote|[[Professor X/Mutant Genocide|He]] would have loved you, too. If he knew about you. If he knew where you were, he would have torn a hole in the fucking universe to bring you home."
"[[Void (End of Time)|This]] is my home."
"Well then at least us save [[Deadpool|his]].|[[Wolverine]] and Cassandra Nova|Deadpool & Wolverine}} The next day, Nova witnessed her [[Cassandra Nova's Lair|compound]] fall under attack by the [[Resistance]], who were joined by [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]. Nova stared at Deadpool, and gave a look of amusement at the heroes' attempt to fight back against her. Nova walked away, leaving her [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen|henchmen]] to deal with the Resistance. [[File:Deadpool & Wolverine Trailer (117).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nova controlling [[Wolverine]] telekinetically]] Nova [[Space Throne|sat down]] and waited for Deadpool and Wolverine to make their way to her, exclaiming that she was fine with them [[Escape from Cassandra Nova's Lair|escaping]], but thought them willingly returning was foolish. Deadpool once again pleaded that he needed to return home, but Nova rejected his request, offering either death or enslavement. Nova threw Deadpool around the room, knocking him out, allowing her and Wolverine to talk. However, Wolverine attacked her, so she forced his claws into the floor, restraining him. [[File:Cassandra torturing Wolverine.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nova forcefully entering [[Wolverine]]'s mind]] Not at risk of being attacked, Nova continued talking to Wolverine, pointing out how interesting she found him, noting that [[Hub:Wade Wilson|Deadpools]] were very common in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]. Nova then entered her finger into Wolverine's head and accessed his mind. Nova was surprised to find the pain that Wolverine was living with behind all of his anger he projected. The two talked about how he abandoned the [[X-Men/Mutant Genocide|X-Men]] before they were all murdered, which led to him going on a killing spree. [[File:Nova in Wolvie's mind.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nova attempts to get [[Wolverine]] on her side]] Sensing his vulnerability, Nova attempted to sway Wolverine, telling him that he could be whoever he truly was in the Void. Wolverine told her that he just wanted to be free from the pain, so Nova assured him she could silence all of the voices in his head that drove his guilt. In a rare moment of compassion, Nova comforted Wolverine, but it turned out Wolverine was just keeping her distracted so that Deadpool could affix [[Juggernaut]]'s [[Juggernaut's Helmet|helmet]] to her head, disabling her powers. [[File:Nova with helmet on.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nova is forced to wear [[Juggernaut]]'s [[Juggernaut's Helmet|helmet]]]] Deadpool demanded that Nova return them home, but she just laughed, knowing that they would need to remove the helmet in order for her to do that. However, Nova evilly declared that if they did take off the helmet she would immediately kill them, remarking that she would boil their brains on an atomic level while masturbating to the {{WPS|Enya}} box set. Realizing they were in a stalemate, Deadpool and Wolverine argued over which one of them would kill Nova, only for her to be shot repeatedly by [[Pyro]]. [[File:Nova decides to help.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nova helps [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]] escape]] With her healing capabilities prevented, Nova would die soon from the gunshot wounds, so Deadpool once more asked if they could trust her not to kill them if he took the helmet off, but Nova remained fixated on killing them instantly. Despite this, Wolverine demanded that the helmet be removed, telling Nova that although he wanted to kill her, [[Professor X/Mutant Genocide|Professor X]] would not want him to let her die. Once the helmet was removed, Nova pretended to go to kill Deadpool, but did not, having been influenced by Wolverine's admiration for her brother. [[File:Nova opens a portal.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nova opens up an [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]]]] Wolverine insisted to Nova that had Professor X known about her existence he would have stopped to no end to find a way to bring her back home. Nova was satisfied with the Void as her home, so Wolverine asked her to help them save [[Earth-10005|Deadpool's]]. Nova equipped the [[Sling Ring]] she took from [[Doctor Strange/Infinity Stone Sling Ring|Doctor Strange]] and used it to open a [[Inter-Dimensional Portal|portal]] to Deadpool's universe. Although she decided to help them, Nova informed them that within seconds [[Alioth]] would devour them, and she watched as Deadpool and Wolverine ran through the portal.{{Ref|DW}} ====[[Attack on Earth-10005|Attacking the Multiverse]]==== [[File:Nova questions Pyro.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nova interrogates [[Pyro]] about his betrayal]] {{Quote|I'm going to use your little [[Time Ripper]] and I'm going to destroy [[Earth-10005|this universe]] and the next, and the next, and the next until all that's left is the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]. And I get to play God.|Cassandra Nova to [[Mr. Paradox]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} Nova stood over the unconscious [[Pyro]], and when he woke up, she wanted to know why he had shot her. She attempted to stick her fingers in his head, but Pyro decided just to tell her, being repulsed by her method of interrogation and told her to simply ask sometimes. Nova learned that [[Mr. Paradox]] made a deal with Pyro to kill Nova in order to be freed from the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]. Angered that Paradox had broken their agreement, Nova decided to enact revenge against him. [[File:Cassandra toys with Paradox (3).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nova confronts [[Mr. Paradox]] for his actions]] Using the [[Sling Ring]], Nova traveled to [[Deadpool]]'s [[Earth-10005|reality]], where she killed Pyro right in front of Deadpool, [[Wolverine]], and [[Mr. Paradox]] and tossed his corpse back into the Void. Nova confronted Paradox for trying to have her killed, and stuck her fingers in his head. Accessing Paradox's mind, Nova discovered the [[Time Ripper]], which Deadpool told her they were planning to destroy. However, Nova wanted to use it, so she launched Deadpool and Wolverine away, leaving just her and Paradox, who she told her plan to destroy the [[Multiverse]] because he broke their arrangement. [[File:Deadpool & Wolverine Final Trailer (17).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nova attempts to destroy [[Deadpool]]'s [[Earth-10005|reality]]]] Nova dragged Paradox to the [[TVA]]'s station in the [[24th Street Station|subway station]], telling him that she summoned the [[Deadpool Corps]] to stop them from being interrupted, and she forced him to activate the the Time Ripper. Nova approached the Time Ripper and began to use it to destroy Deadpool's universe. Right as she was about to completely obliterate the reality, the process started to be undone by Deadpool and Wolverine. Nova tried to resist, but they were able to overload the Time Ripper, which atomized Nova, killing her.{{Ref|DW}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|You led an Omega-level [[mutant]] to [[Earth-10005|this timeline]].|[[B-15]] to [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} *'''Mutant Physiology''': Cassandra Nova was an Omega-level [[mutant]] as well as the twin sister of the powerful telepath [[Professor X/Cassandra Nova Birthed|Charles Xavier]]. Hence, she possessed powers similar to Xavier's. **'''Psionics''': Nova's mutation granted her a wide array of psionic abilities. As an Omega-level Mutant, her psionic powers were exceptionally potent, enabling her to endure in the hostile environment of the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] and establish a [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen|community]] of loyal survivors. ***'''Telekinesis''': [[File:Cassandra Nova uses telekinesis on Wolverine.png|thumb|250px|Nova controlling [[Wolverine]]'s body]] Nova could move things with her mind, as shown when she telekinetically controlled [[Wolverine]]'s body and easily skinned [[Human Torch/Void-Analyzing Fantastic Four|Johnny Storm]], killing him instantly. ****'''Telekinetic Regeneration''': Due to her advanced telekinetic capabilities, Nova could endure and regenerate from fatal injuries with ease. This ability allowed her to survive most encounters with [[Resistance]] [[:Category:Resistance Members|members]] who attempted to defeat her. However, this regeneration ability was limited, as she lost this ability, along with her other telekinetic-based ones, when she was under influence of a mind-nullifying object, such as [[Magneto/Earth-10005|Magneto]]'s [[Magneto's Helmet|helmet]] or [[Juggernaut]]'s. ****'''Telekinetic Blast''': [[File:Deadpool & Wolverine Purpose (23).png|thumb|250px|Nova blasts [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]] into [[Liefeld's]]]] Nova could project waves of telekinetic energy to impulse, hit and destroy multiple objects and/or people. With a snap of her fingers, she was able to create a shock wave of telekinetic energy to send Deadpool and Wolverine several meters away. ****'''Intangibility''': Nova could pass through solid matter by passing her atoms through the spaces between the atoms of the object through which she was moving. In this way, she and the object through which she was passing could temporarily merge without interacting, and each was unharmed once Nova finished passing through the object. She could make her fingers penetrate her targets' heads to read their minds, as demonstrated with [[Deadpool]] and Wolverine. Additionally, she could merge this ability with her telekinesis to break a target's neck, as she did with [[Pyro]]. ***'''Tactile Telepathy''': [[File:Cassandra's finger in Logan's forehead.png|thumb|250px|Nova forcefully entering [[Wolverine]]'s mind]] Unlike her twin brother, Nova needed physical contact with her target to activate her telepathy. ****'''Memory Manipulation''': Nova could enter and interact with another person's memories. She used this power to extract information, as demonstrated when she delved into Wolverine's memories to understand the root of his rage. She also employed this ability on Pyro and [[Paradox]] to learn about the [[Time Ripper]] and how to utilize it. ***'''Mental Manipulation''': Nova's mutant powers allowed her to interfere with the minds of other beings, being able to mentally torture [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]. ***'''Teleportation''': Nova could instantaneously move from one location to another without physically occupying the space in between. In her first encounter with [[Deadpool]], she teleported behind him to use her telepathy on him and later did the same with [[Paradox]]. *'''[[Magic]]''': Once she killed an [[Doctor Strange/Infinity Stone Sling Ring|alternate Doctor Strange]] who was banished to the Void, Cassandra Nova kept his [[Sling Ring]] which granted her several [[magic]] powers, including the ability to conjure [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]]s with ease. **'''[[Magic#Eldritch Magic|Eldritch Magic]]''': ''To be added'' ***'''Portal Creation''': Nova had a Sling Ring, able to create sustained portals between two points. Using the portals, she was able to transport others to another dimension and later retrieve them. ===Abilities=== {{Expand}} *'''Master Tactician''': ''To be added'' ==Equipment== *'''[[Sling Ring]]''': Cassandra Nova used a Sling Ring, with the Reality Stone and the Time Stone embedded in each side of the Ring. This artifact belonged to an alternate Doctor Strange who was murdered by Nova. She used the Sling Ring to transport Deadpool and Wolverine to Deadpool's universe, and later to bring herself and the Deadpool Corps to confront Paradox. {{Expand}} *'''[[Cloak of Levitation]]''': ''To be added'' *'''[[Space Throne]]''': ''To be added'' ===Vehicles=== {{Expand}} *'''[[Charles Xavier's Wheelchair]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Professor X/Cassandra Nova Birthed|Charles Xavier]] - Twin Brother and Attempted Victim ===Allies=== *[[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen]] - Subordinates **[[Sabretooth|Victor Creed/Sabretooth]] † **[[Toad|Mortimer Toynbee/Toad]] † **[[Azazel]] † **[[Callisto]] † **[[Juggernaut]] † **[[Lady Deathstrike|Yuriko Oyama/Lady Deathstrike]] **[[Psylocke|Betsy Braddock/Psylocke]] † **[[Russian|Ivan/Russian]] † **[[Bullseye/Forehead Scar Bullseye|Lester/Bullseye]] † **[[Blob|Fred Dukes/Blob]] † **[[Quill]] † **[[Arclight|Phillipa Sontag/Arclight]] † *[[Deadpool Corps]] - Subordinates **[[Ladypool|Wanda Wilson/Ladypool]] **[[Kidpool|Wanda Wilson/Kidpool]] **[[Headpool|Wade Wilson/Headpool]] **[[Babypool|Wade Wilson/Babypool]] **[[Golden Age Deadpool|Fredrick Wilson/Golden Age Deadpool]] **[[Cowboypool|Wade Wilson/Cowboypool]] **[[Deadpool 2099|Warda Wilson/Deadpool 2099]] **[[Welshpool|Wade Wilson/Welshpool]] **[[Zenpool|Wade Wilson/Zenpool]] **[[Canadapool|Wade Wilson/Canadapool]] **[[Scottishpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] **[[Deadpool/Pirate Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] **[[Samuraipool|Watari/Samuraipool]] **[[Kingpool|Wade Wilson/Kingpool]] **[[Richpool|Wade Wilson/Richpool]] **[[Shortpool|Wade Wilson/Shortpool]] **[[Haroldpool|Wade Wilson/Haroldpool]] **[[Deadpool/Detective Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] **[[Deadpool/Winged Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] **[[Deadpool/Red-Hooded Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] **[[Deadpool/White Hat Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Time Variance Authority]] **[[Mr. Paradox's Crew]] ***[[Mr. Paradox]] - Attempted Victim ***[[Ralph (TVA)|Ralph]] ***[[Pyro|John Allerdyce/Pyro]] † - Former Subordinate, Attempted Killer, and Victim *[[Alioth]] *[[Resistance]] **[[X-23|X-23/Laura]] **[[Elektra/Forgotten Elektra|Elektra]] **[[Blade/Universe Defender Blade|Eric Brooks/Blade]] **[[Gambit|Remy LeBeau/Gambit]] **[[Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] - Former Prisoner and Killer **[[Wolverine|Logan/Wolverine]] - Former Prisoner and Killer **[[Human Torch/Void-Analyzing Fantastic Four|Johnny Storm/Human Torch]] † - Prisoner and Victim **[[Magneto/Earth-10005|Erik Lehnsherr/Magneto]] † - Victim **[[Punisher/AT4 Owner Punisher|Frank Castle/Punisher]] † - Victim **[[Quicksilver/Earth-10005|Peter Maximoff/Quicksilver]] † - Victim **[[Daredevil/Forgotten Elektra|Matt Murdock/Daredevil]] † - Victim *[[Doctor Strange/Infinity Stone Sling Ring|Stephen Strange/Doctor Strange]] † - Victim {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Cassandra Nova is the twin sister of [[Charles Xavier]] who was nearly killed while in the womb. A fierce enemy of the [[X-Men]], she is most famous for orchestrating the genocide on Genosha, killing more than fifteen million mutant residents with a rogue [[Sentinels|Sentinel]]. *She is the fifth female main antagonist in a [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] film, following [[Hela]], [[Ghost]], [[Scarlet Witch]] and [[Dar-Benn]]. *Nova is the fourth main antagonist to be killed by the titular character(s) of the film in which she appears. *Cassandra Nova is the second main antagonist of an Marvel Cinematic Universe film to originate from another universe, the first being [[Green Goblin]]. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Emma Corrin]]'s casting as Cassandra Nova was because ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' director [[Shawn Levy]] saw them in a performance of {{WPS|Virginia Woolf}}'s ''{{WPS|Orlando: A Biography}}'' stage play in 2022, with Corrin accepting the role as they were interested in playing a villain.[https://www.empireonline.com/movies/news/emma-corrin-villain-deadpool-3/ Emma Corrin On The OA Creators’ New Show A Murder At The End Of The World: ‘It’s So Ahead Of Its Time’] *[[Marvel Studios]] eyed Emma Corrin to play Cassandra Nova since late 2022 around {{WPS|Christmas}}, but they had to work out their busy schedule to make sure they could fully commit to the role, settling any arrangements around early February 2023.[https://deadline.com/2023/02/deadpool-3-emma-corrin-lands-lead-role-in-marvel-studios-sequel-1235258306/ ‘Deadpool 3’: Emma Corrin Lands Lead Role In Marvel Studios Sequel] *''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' casting director [[Sarah Halley Finn]] cast Emma Corrin as Cassandra Nova due to feeling they could hold their own opposite [[Ryan Reynolds (actor)|Ryan Reynolds]] and [[Hugh Jackman]], feeling that Nova had to encompass her power in a unique and fresh way, resulting in Finn loving how Corrin played the role.[https://variety.com/2025/artisans/news/jonathan-bailey-almost-missed-wicked-1236295150/ Casting Directors Reveal How Jonathan Bailey Almost Missed Out on ‘Wicked’ and Why Emma Corrin Made the Perfect ‘Deadpool & Wolverine’ Villain] *Emma Corrin was praised by Ryan Reynolds and Hugh Jackman for being like "a skin-covered {{WPS|Swiss Army knife}}" to work with and their ability to "subtly change - to turn on a dime" with an effortlessness while portraying Cassandra Nova, with Reynolds feeling that Corrin brought a {{WPS|Gene Wilder}}-type of energy to Nova, made her motivations easier to understand and humanized her dialogue by inspiring themselves on {{WPS|Christopher Waltz}}'s {{WPS|Hans Landa}} from ''{{WPS|Inglourious Basterds}}''.[https://www.harpersbazaar.com/culture/film-tv/a60814103/emma-corrin-interview-june-july-2024/ Emma Corrin Is in a League of Their Own] *To help inform their own performance as Cassandra Nova, Emma Corrin looked back at the performances of both [[Patrick Stewart]] and {{WPS|James McAvoy}} as {{WPS|Charles Xavier (film character)|Charles Xavier/Professor X}} in {{WPS|20th Century Studios|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}} with some reluctance to not resemble their performances too close. They ultimately opted to look for any bits they could pay homage to for fans to enjoy and to faithfully adapt Nova from the source material in both looks and origins.[https://screenrant.com/deadpool-wolverine-cassandra-nova-xmen-professor-x-connection-emma-corrin-response/ Deadpool & Wolverine: Cassandra Nova's Family History With Professor X & More X-Men Connections Teased By Star] ==References== {{Gallery|Cassandra Nova/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP}} [[es:Cassandra Nova]] [[pt-br:Cassandra Nova]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Deadpool & Wolverine Characters]] [[Category:Mutants]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Bald Hair]] [[Category:Blue Eyes]] [[Category:Sorcerers]] [[Category:Cassandra Nova's Henchmen Leaders]] [[Category:Variants Monitored by the TVA]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Deadpool]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Wolverine]] [[Category:Pruned]]
